refnamediv.refpurpose: Rectify an image with a projective homography.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: out = imrectify(image, homography) out = imrectify(image, homography, [rows cols])

listitem.para: Input grayscale, color, or Boolean image.
Standard 3-by-3 projective homography using the OpenCV convention.
Optional output dimensions. The input dimensions are used by default.
Rectified image with the same numeric or Boolean type as image.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Applies a 3-by-3 projective transform while preserving the input image type and numeric range. The identity transform returns the input without invoking the perspective gateway.

refsection.title: Examples

tr.td: Function introduced with input type preservation and standard homography orientation.
